# sagemcom_dhcp_reserved_address (Resource)

DHCP Static Lease (Reserved Address) resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "sagemcom_dhcp_reserved_address" "example" {
  mac_address = "00:11:22:33:44:55"
  ip_address  = "192.168.1.100"
  hostname    = "my-laptop"
  enabled     = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hostname` (String) Friendly hostname of the client (where known by the router).
- `ip_address` (String) The IP address assigned to the client.
- `mac_address` (String) The MAC address of the client.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Toggle state of the DHCP reservation. Defaults to `true`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The internal ID of the DHCP reservation.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# DHCP static IP leases (Reserved Addresses) can be imported using the client's MAC address:
terraform import sagemcom_dhcp_reserved_address.example "00:11:22:33:44:55"
```
